title: Implement get_save_data() in MerlinStore
description: merlin_game_controller.gd:285 calls store.get_save_data() but the method doesn't exist in MerlinStore. save_data stays as {} fallback, so biome_runs/fins_vues/oghams_owned are always default. Need to implement func get_save_data() -> Dictionary in merlin_store.gd returning save_system.load_profile().
notes: Implemented: func get_save_data() -> Dictionary returns save_system.load_profile(). Director decision: load_profile() entier (q-20260414-003). Placed in merlin_store.gd:649 convenience getters section.

title: Regression test: arc_condition_type evaluation correctness
description: After S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL fix: CHK-1: runs_in_biome arc locked run 0, unlocked run 3+. CHK-2: fins_vues arc locked=0 unlocked=5. CHK-3: oghams_owned locked=1 unlocked=2. CHK-4: faction_rep still correct. CHK-5: biome_runs_map key correct. CHK-6: context has fins_vues/oghams_owned keys.
notes: FAIL_CRITICAL 3/6: CHK-1/2/3 failed due to missing get_save_data(). get_save_data() implemented this cycle in merlin_store.gd:649. CHK-4/5/6 PASS. Root cause fixed. Re-test needed after SAVE-GET-SAVE-DATA-IMPL applied.

title: VERIFIED: parchment_pre_run.gd already uses PixelTransition guard (false positive)
description: SPEC-14 FALSE POSITIVE: parchment_pre_run.gd:213-217 already has correct pattern: var pt=get_node_or_null('/root/PixelTransition'); if pt and pt.has_method('transition_to'): pt.transition_to(SCENE_FOREST) else: get_tree().change_scene_to_file(SCENE_FOREST). No action needed. Verified PASS.
notes: False positive — parchment_pre_run.gd already uses PixelTransition guard. Archived by META-EVOLUTION cycle.

title: Rebuild live_dashboard.md with real specialist rotation stats
description: Replace stale AUTODEV v3 worker dashboard with current specialist rotation data: cycle counts, pending tasks by type/sprint, top priority tasks, last 3 cycles, metrics. IMPLEMENTED this cycle.
notes: IMPLEMENTED: Rebuilt live_dashboard.md with real specialist rotation stats (cycle counts, queue, top5 tasks, last3 cycles, specialist coverage grid). Also fixed studio_insights.json duplicate IDs (25 entries → 25 unique sequential IDs). Archived verified false-positive E2E-PARCHMENT-PRERUN-PIXEL-TRANSITION.

title: Test: all 8 lexical fields dispatch correct minigame scripts
description: Verify that for each of the 8 fields (chance,bluff,observation,logique,finesse,vigueur,esprit,perception): (1) detect_field() returns the correct field from representative text, (2) create_minigame(field) returns a non-null MiniGameBase subclass, (3) the returned script class matches expected field, (4) neutre field falls back to esprit correctly after MG-FIX-NEUTRE-FALLBACK. Reference: minigame_registry.gd GAMES dict.
notes: PARTIAL_PASS: 4/6 checks pass. CHK-4 neutre→esprit PASS. CHK-5 FAIL: select_minigame() returned "apaisement" (game name) not field name. CHK-6 FAIL: pick_minigame_for_field() same issue. FIXED: both functions now return MerlinConstants.ACTION_VERB_FALLBACK_FIELD. test_effect_engine.gd:1424 expectation updated. BUG-MG-APAISEMENT-FALLBACK resolved.
